title: National Social Pension for Indigent Senior Citizens (SocPen)
description: Monthly stipend of Php 1,000.00 given by DSWD and distributed by LGU Juban to indigent senior citizens to augment daily subsistence and medical needs.

title: LGU Juban Centenarian Cash Gift
description: One-time cash gift of Php 50,000.00 for senior citizens reaching 100 years old, as authorized under Local Ordinance.

title: Milestone Cash Gift (80, 90 years old)
description: LGU cash incentive for senior citizens celebrating their 80th birthday (Php 5,000.00) and 90th birthday (Php 10,000.00) to support longevity.

title: Free Medical Maintenance Subsidy
description: Quarterly provision of essential hypertension and diabetes medications (Amlodipine, Metformin, Losartan) from the Municipal Health Office.

title: Barangay Birthday Cash Voucher
description: Php 500.00 birthday cash voucher sponsored by Barangay Councils of Juban, Sorsogon.
